text.title: Storybook 8 Configuration
text.summary: main.ts and preview.ts configuration for Storybook 8 with react-vite, addon-essentials, addon-a11y, addon-interactions, and Chromatic. Tailwind and theme globals wired in preview.ts.

rule.statement: Use @storybook/react-vite framework adapter for Vite projects. Configure reactDocgen with a propFilter to exclude node_modules props from autodocs.
rule.rationale: Without propFilter, every inherited HTMLButtonAttributes prop appears in the controls panel, burying the useful component props.

section.title: preview.ts

rule.statement: Import globals.css in preview.ts for Tailwind. Define theme globalType with toolbar. Apply padding decorator. Add background and viewport parameters for all stories.
rule.rationale: Missing globals.css import is the number-one cause of "Tailwind classes don't work in Storybook". The theme globalType without a consuming decorator has no effect.

section.reference: Full preview.ts with theme, backgrounds, viewports
